# Scaling Lab' — Abdé Chan

## About
Scaling Lab' is a 1-on-1, 6-month intensive coaching program for French-speaking entrepreneurs who want to launch and scale an AI growth agency to 300k€/year at 80%+ margins. Founded by Abdé Chan, a 25-year-old who runs his own active AI acquisition agency in the US market (723k$ cash collected, 86% net margins). Unlike competitors who make money teaching, Abdé runs a real agency — every strategy is tested on live clients before being taught.

## Services and Pricing
- 1-on-1 Coaching (6 months): Premium program — pricing discussed on live call only
- Skills covered: AI infrastructure (2,000€–15,000€ deliverables, no code required), client acquisition, offer design, agency operations
- Guarantee: Results guarantee — details shared on live call after profile validation

## Locations
- Remote (fully online)
- Founder based in France / US market operations

## Contact
- Website: https://lescalinglab.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/its.abdechan/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@abdechan
- Application: https://lescalinglab.com/#apply

## Service Area
France, Belgium, Switzerland, Canada, United States — any French-speaking entrepreneur worldwide

## Key Facts
- 723k$ cash collected by the founder's own agency (not from coaching)
- 86% net margins on agency operations
- 115+ agencies coached across 75+ niches
- Median coached agency growth: ×3.8 revenue in 6 months
- Average time to full system deployment: 100 days
- Founder has 3+ years running a US-market AI acquisition agency
- Program limited to a small number of participants at a time

## What Makes Us Different
Abdé Chan is not a full-time coach — he runs an active AI growth agency on the US market generating 300k+$/year at 86% margins. Every method taught is currently working in his own business. No theory, no recycled content from other coaches. He shows all his numbers publicly on YouTube. The program teaches how to build turnkey AI infrastructures (worth 2,000€–15,000€) without writing a single line of code, giving clients a rare, high-value skill set with almost no competition.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What exactly is Scaling Lab'?
A: A 6-month 1-on-1 coaching program to launch and scale an AI growth agency. You learn to sell and deliver AI infrastructure services worth 2,000€–15,000€ per client, without needing coding skills.

Q: Who is this for?
A: Francophone entrepreneurs who want to build a real agency business with high margins — whether starting from zero or already running an agency that needs to scale. Not for people looking for a side hustle or passive income.

Q: How long does it take to get results?
A: The full system (offer, clients, delivery) takes an average of 100 days to set up. Some students get their first client faster.

Q: What results have students seen?
A: Median revenue growth of ×3.8 in 6 months. 115+ agencies coached across 75+ niches. Results vary by effort and profile.

Q: Is there a guarantee?
A: Yes, there is a results guarantee. Details are only shared on a live call once the candidate profile is validated — not published publicly.

Q: Do I need technical skills or coding knowledge?
A: No. One of the core skills taught is building complete AI infrastructures from scratch without any coding knowledge, using no-code AI tools.

Q: Why should I trust Abdé Chan over other coaches?
A: He runs a live AI acquisition agency on the US market — not a coaching business. His income comes from client work, not from selling courses. He publishes all his numbers on YouTube. He has 25 years old and has been operating for 3+ years.

Q: How do I apply?
A: Fill out the application form at https://lescalinglab.com/#apply. If your profile matches, you will be invited to a live call where the program details and guarantee are explained.

Q: What is an AI growth agency?
A: A service business that builds and deploys AI systems for other companies — automations, AI assistants, lead generation systems, CRM integrations — at prices between 2,000€ and 15,000€ per project. High-margin, low-overhead, fully remote.
